notes: Underwriter of this white paper; offers Asset Recovery Services (ARS) for desktops, notebooks, servers, storage, networking, monitors, printers, projectors, peripherals.
Author organization; Boston-based market research and consulting firm; paper underwritten by Dell.
Cited as authority on heavy-metal content of electronic waste (70% of heavy metals in US garbage dumps from electronics).
Cited Sept 2003 warning that copyright-infringing software falling into unlicensed hands on resold equipment can trigger penalties. [REVIEW]
Research partner with Aberdeen and Siemens Business Services on PC refresh-cycle timing (36- vs 48-month disposal).
Joint research partner on PC disposal-timing study with Aberdeen and Intel. [REVIEW]
Passed WEEE (Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment) order, effective August 2005, outlawing illegal IT-equipment dumping.
